title: Ace (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:Black_Sun_Ace_XWM.png|thumb|right|250px|A Black Sun Ace pilot in a ''Kihraxz'' assault fighter.]]
The word "'''ace'''" can refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
===Titles===
*'''[[Ace]]''', a title given to combat [[pilot]]s with a certain number of kills
*'''[[Ace leader]]''', the callsign of the leader of Ace Squadron

===Gaming===
*The '''[[ace of coins]]''', a [[sabacc]] card
*The '''[[ace of sabres]]''', a sabacc card

===Groups===
*'''[[Ace Squadron]]''', a racing team and combat [[squadron]] based out of the ''[[Colossus]]''
*The '''[[Tierfon Yellow Aces]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel Alliance]] [[starfighter]] squadron

===Individuals===
*'''[[Ace Kallisto]]''', a [[human]] [[Gender|female]] [[master Thief]]

===Vehicles===
*The '''''[[Black Ace]]''''', a modified [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter]] owned by [[Griff Halloran]]
*The '''''[[Blue Ace]]''''', [[Torra Doza]]'s custom-built [[racing starfighter]]
*The '''''[[Green Ace]]''''', a modified [[G30 racing starfighter]] owned by [[Hype Fazon]]
*The '''''[[Red Ace]]''''', [[Freya Fenris]]' racing starfighter
*The '''''[[Yellow Ace]]''''', [[Bo Keevil]]'s racing starfighter

===Other===
*The '''[[Aces' Lounge]]''', a location on the ''Colossus''{{'}} [[Doza Tower]] reserved for the members of Ace Squadron
*The '''[[All Aces Battle Royale]]''', a race on the ''Colossus''

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===Titles===
*'''[[Ace/Legends|Ace]]''', a title given to combat [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]]
*'''[[Jedi ace]]''', a specialized path taken by would-be [[Jedi Guardian/Legends|Jedi Guardians]]

===Gaming===
*The '''[[Ace ring]]''', highest-scoring ring in [[ringers]]

===Groups===
*'''[[Ace Entertainment Corporation]]''', a company that owned casinos
*'''[[Ace Squadron (New Republic)|Ace Squadron]]''', a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] squadron
*The '''[[Crimson Aces]]''', a mercenary organization
*The '''[[Taanab Yellow Aces]]''', a starfighter squadron
*The '''[[Tierfon Yellow Aces/Legends|Tierfon Yellow Aces]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] starfighter squadron

===Individuals===
*'''[[Ace (kid)|Ace]]''', an associate of the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Tirog]] and the space [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Drebble]]
*'''[[Ace (nickname)|Ace]]''', a contestant in [[The Big Game]]
*'''[[Ace (swooper)|Ace]]''', leader of the [[Afterburners]] swoop gang
*'''[[Ace (clone trooper)|18 (Ace)]]''', a nickname that was possibly gained by a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] in [[Excelsior Company]]
*'''[[AC-38/Legends|AC-38]]''', a [[Pilot droid/Legends|pilot droid]] that worked for the [[Star Tours/Legends|Star Tours]] company
*'''[[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]]''', a pilot in the Rebel Alliance
*'''[[Ace Fendo]]''', a [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]]
*'''[[Ace Merrick]]''', a Rebel pilot
*'''Ace''', the callsign of the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Voidhound]]
*'''[[Acer Ash]]''', a [[Human/Legends|Human]] black marketer
*'''[[Acey]]''', a petty thief
*"'''[[Imperial Ace]]'''", a TIE fighter pilot
*'''"Ace" [[Lorle]]''', owner of the [[Clubs]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]]

===Technology===
*The '''[[Ace-6 droid brain]]'''
*The '''[[ACE Ejection Seat]]'''

===Other===
*'''''[[Ace in the Hole: A Cockpit's-Eye View of Turbulent Times]]''''', [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles']] memoir
*The '''[[Ace of Sabres]]''', a resort on [[Kluistar]]
*The '''[[Black Sun Ace Fighter Helmet]]'''

==Non-canon media==
*'''[[Super Ace]]''', a [[stormtrooper]] in ''[[Star Wars Detours]]''

==Real world==
===Comics===
*'''''[[All Aces Battle Royale (comic story)|All Aces Battle Royale]]''''', a ''[[Star Wars Resistance]]'' tie-in comic in [[Star Wars Adventures (2017)|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017)]]

===Games===
*'''''[[Ace Assault]]''''', an online game on [[StarWars.com]]
**'''''[[Ace Assault II]]''''', its sequel
*'''''[[Republic Ace]]''''', an online Flash game
*'''''[[Star Wars: Imperial Ace]]''''', a [[2008]] video game

===Magazines===
*'''''[[State of the Arts|Star Wars Starfighter: Starfighter Aces]]''''', an article in [[Star Wars Gamer 2|''Star Wars Gamer'' 2]]
*'''[[Starfighter Aces]]''', a department in ''[[Star Wars: Build Your Own X-Wing]]''

===Tabletop gaming===
*'''''[[Hotshots and Aces Reinforcements Pack]]''''', an expansion pack for ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Second Edition]]''
*'''[[Imperial Aces Expansion Pack]]''' for the ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Miniatures Game]]''
*'''[[Rebel Aces Expansion Pack]]''' for the ''X-Wing Miniatures Game''

===People===
*'''[[Ace Landers]]''', an author of children's books

==See also==
*[[Ace of Staves (disambiguation)]]

}}
